$questionId..validate:
newData.hasChildren(['text', 'timestamp']) &&
            !newData.hasChildren(['from', 'fromName', 'sender', 'senderId']) &&
            newData.child('text').isString() &&
            newData.child('text').val().length > 0 &&
            newData.child('text').val().length <= 500 &&
            newData.child('timestamp').isNumber() &&
            newData.child('timestamp').val() <= now &&
            newData.child('timestamp').val() > (now - 300000)
